description: A year of high-volume training for the advanced lifter who's earned the recovery to handle it. A Push/Pull/Legs split run twice over, six days a week, with three phases moving from foundation hypertrophy through strength-hypertrophy crossover to a metabolic finisher. Per-muscle volume sits at the upper end of the productive range throughout — close to MRV, deloaded between blocks, with exercises rotating to keep the stimulus from going stale.
